questionHtml:
Which part of aerobic respiration directly involves oxygen molecules?

A.  Conversion of glucose to pyruvate

B.  Accepting electrons from the electron transport chain

C.  Oxidizing acetyl groups in the Krebs cycle

D.  Production of NAD from reduced NAD

meta.title: Which part of aerobic respiration directly involves oxygen molecules? A. Conversion of glucose to pyruvate B. Accepting electrons from the electron transport chain C. Oxidizing ace
breadcrumbLabels: C1.2.16. Role of oxygen as terminal electron acceptor in aerobic cell respiration
